revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Deleted_template here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ #ifexpr:{{#time:U|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP}}}}>{{#time:U|{{{3|now}}}}} |{{ #ifeq:{{NAMESPACE:Template:{{{2|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}:{{{2|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}} |{{{4|}}} |{{ #if:{{ #ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template |{{ #switch:{{lc:{{#titleparts:{{FULLPAGENAME}}||-1}}}} |sandbox |testcases = |#default = x }} |x }} | }} }}''The template {{tl|{{{2|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}} has been deprecated since {{{3|{{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}, and is retained only for old [[:Help:Page history|revisions]]. If this page is a current revision, please remove the template{{{extra|.}}}'' |{{{4|}}} }}{{documentation}} [[Category:Pages containing deleted templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
